queries.title: [0] DB Health Check
queries.content:
RETURN {
  GitCommit: LENGTH(GitCommit),
  RTL_Module: LENGTH(RTL_Module),
  DesignEpoch: LENGTH(DesignEpoch),
  DesignSituation: LENGTH(DesignSituation),
  BELONGS_TO_EPOCH: LENGTH(BELONGS_TO_EPOCH),
  CROSS_REPO_SIMILAR_TO: LENGTH(CROSS_REPO_SIMILAR_TO),
  CROSS_REPO_EVOLVED_FROM: LENGTH(CROSS_REPO_EVOLVED_FROM),
  OR1200_entities: LENGTH(OR1200_Entities),
  MOR1KX_entities: LENGTH(MOR1KX_Entities),
  IBEX_entities: LENGTH(IBEX_Entities),
  MAROCCHINO_entities: LENGTH(MAROCCHINO_Entities)
}
queries.description: Pre-demo sanity check. Expected: 3808 commits, 6594 modules, 390 epochs, 723 situations.

queries.title: [1a] The Living Graph — Scope Overview
queries.description: Scene 1 opener. Shows the scope: 4 repos, 3808 commits, 6594 modules, 390 epochs spanning 30 years.

queries.title: [1b] Epoch Timeline — MOR1KX Milestones
queries.content:
FOR e IN DesignEpoch
  FILTER e.repo == "openrisc/mor1kx.git"
  FILTER e.epoch_type == "milestone_tag"
      OR e.epoch_type == "initial_commit"
  SORT e.start_ts ASC
  RETURN {
    epoch: e.label,
    git_tag: e.git_tag,
    date: DATE_FORMAT(e.start_ts * 1000, "%yyyy-%mm"),
    epoch_type: e.epoch_type
  }
queries.description: Scene 1. MOR1KX milestone timeline from initial commit (2012) through v5.2 (2024). Shows release cadence.

queries.title: [2a] Time Machine — OR1200 at GitHub Migration (2009)
queries.content:
LET target_ts = 1243238472
FOR m IN RTL_Module
  FILTER m.repo == "openrisc/or1200.git"
  FILTER m.valid_from_ts <= target_ts
  FILTER m.valid_to_ts > target_ts
  SORT m.label ASC
  RETURN {
    module: m.label,
    epoch:  m.design_epoch,
    file:   m.file
  }
queries.description: Scene 2. Point-in-time query: what 60 modules existed when OR1200 arrived on GitHub (May 2009).

queries.title: [2b] Time Machine — OR1200 Before/After rel3
queries.content:
LET before_ts = 1243238472
LET after_ts  = 1283211145

LET before = (FOR m IN RTL_Module FILTER m.repo == "openrisc/or1200.git"
  FILTER m.valid_from_ts <= before_ts AND m.valid_to_ts > before_ts
  RETURN m.label)

LET after = (FOR m IN RTL_Module FILTER m.repo == "openrisc/or1200.git"
  FILTER m.valid_from_ts <= after_ts AND m.valid_to_ts > after_ts
  RETURN m.label)

RETURN {
  modules_at_svn_migration: LENGTH(before),
  modules_after_rel3:        LENGTH(after),
  new_in_rel3:               MINUS(after, before),
  removed_in_rel3:           MINUS(before, after)
}
queries.description: Scene 2. Temporal diff: which modules were added/removed between SVN migration and rel3 release.

queries.title: [2c] Time Machine — Ibex Module Growth
queries.content:
FOR e IN DesignEpoch
  FILTER e.repo == "lowRISC/ibex.git"
  LET module_count = LENGTH(
    FOR m IN RTL_Module
      FILTER m.repo == "lowRISC/ibex.git"
      FILTER m.valid_from_ts <= (e.end_ts != null ? e.end_ts : 9999999999)
      FILTER m.valid_to_ts > e.start_ts
      RETURN 1
  )
  FILTER module_count > 0
  SORT e.start_ts ASC
  LIMIT 15
  RETURN {
    epoch:   SPLIT(e.label, " — ")[1],
    date:    DATE_FORMAT(e.start_ts * 1000, "%yyyy-%mm"),
    modules: module_count
  }
queries.description: Scene 2. Ibex growth curve: 14 modules in 2015 → 24+ over hundreds of epochs.

queries.title: [3a] Design Situations — Inventory
queries.content:
FOR s IN DesignSituation
  COLLECT class = s.situation_class, repo = s.repo WITH COUNT INTO n
  SORT repo, class
  RETURN {situation_class: class, repo: repo, count: n}
queries.description: Scene 3. What kinds of design situations exist across all repos?

queries.title: [3b] Design Situations — Major Refactor
queries.content:
FOR s IN DesignSituation
  FILTER s.repo == "lowRISC/ibex.git"
  FILTER s.situation_class == "major_refactor"
  SORT s.valid_from_ts ASC
  LIMIT 1
  LET affected_modules = (
    FOR m IN RTL_Module
      FILTER m.repo == s.repo
      FILTER m.design_epoch == s.epoch
      RETURN m.label
  )
  RETURN {
    situation:    s.label,
    epoch:        s.epoch,
    date_range:   DATE_FORMAT(s.valid_from_ts * 1000, "%yyyy-%mm-%dd"),
    tags:         s.tags,
    modules_in_epoch: LENGTH(affected_modules),
    sample_modules: affected_modules[0..4]
  }
queries.description: Scene 3. A dramatic refactor situation in Ibex — what changed and when.

queries.title: [3c] Design Situations — Release Preparations
queries.content:
FOR s IN DesignSituation
  FILTER s.situation_class == "release_prep"
  SORT s.valid_from_ts ASC
  RETURN {
    repo:    s.repo,
    release: s.epoch,
    date:    DATE_FORMAT(s.valid_from_ts * 1000, "%yyyy-%mm-%dd"),
    outcome: s.outcome,
    tags:    s.tags
  }
queries.description: Scene 3. Every release preparation moment — automatically derived from git tags.

queries.title: [4a] Cross-Repo — Structural Bridges
queries.content:
FOR e IN CROSS_REPO_SIMILAR_TO
  LET src = DOCUMENT(e._from)
  LET tgt = DOCUMENT(e._to)
  FILTER src != null AND tgt != null
  SORT e.similarity_score DESC
  RETURN {
    from_module: src.label,
    from_repo:   src.repo,
    to_module:   tgt.label,
    to_repo:     tgt.repo,
    score:       e.similarity_score,
    type:        e.similarity_type
  }
queries.description: Scene 4. Cross-repo structural DNA: modules like cpu, alu, ctrl appear across OR1200, MOR1KX, Ibex.

queries.title: [4b] Cross-Repo — Evolutionary Lineage
queries.content:
FOR e IN CROSS_REPO_EVOLVED_FROM
  LET src = DOCUMENT(e._from)
  LET tgt = DOCUMENT(e._to)
  RETURN {
    evolved:     src.repo,
    derived_from: tgt.repo,
    evidence:    e.lineage_type,
    score:       e.similarity_score
  }
queries.description: Scene 4. Architectural lineage: marocchino evolved from mor1kx.

queries.title: [5a] Déjà Vu — Fetch Module Situations
queries.content:
FOR s IN DesignSituation
  FILTER s.situation_class == "subsystem_addition"
  FILTER LENGTH(
    FOR t IN s.tags
      FILTER CONTAINS(LOWER(t), "fetch") OR CONTAINS(LOWER(t), "if_")
      RETURN 1
  ) > 0
  SORT s.valid_from_ts ASC
  RETURN {
    repo:    s.repo,
    epoch:   s.epoch,
    date:    DATE_FORMAT(s.valid_from_ts * 1000, "%yyyy-%mm-%dd"),
    modules: s.tags,
    outcome: s.outcome
  }
queries.description: Scene 5. The Déjà Vu Index: has anyone added a fetch module before? When and where?

queries.title: [T1] Module Time-Travel — mor1kx_cpu_cappuccino (Graph View)
queries.content:
FOR epoch IN DesignEpoch
  FILTER epoch.repo == 'openrisc/mor1kx.git'
    AND epoch.epoch_type == 'milestone_tag'
  SORT epoch.start_ts ASC
  LET snap = FIRST(
    FOR mod IN INBOUND epoch BELONGS_TO_EPOCH
      FILTER mod.label == 'mor1kx_cpu_cappuccino'
      SORT mod.valid_from_ts DESC
      LIMIT 1
      RETURN mod
  )
  FILTER snap != null
  FOR epoch2, e, p IN 1..1 OUTBOUND snap BELONGS_TO_EPOCH
    FILTER epoch2._id == epoch._id
    RETURN p
queries.description: Visualizer: mor1kx_cpu_cappuccino across 4 milestones (2013→2022). Run → Graph tab. Hover nodes for file_hash evolution.

queries.title: [T2] Design Snapshot — MOR1KX 5.0.r2 (Graph View)
queries.content:
FOR v, e, p IN 1..1 INBOUND 'DesignEpoch/6cb4a54f1b52ca81' BELONGS_TO_EPOCH
  RETURN p
queries.description: Visualizer: all 76 modules active at MOR1KX 5.0.r2 (Dec 2017). Run → Graph tab shows epoch hub with 76 spokes.

queries.title: [T3] Commit-Level — Wishbone Interface Refactor (Graph View)
queries.content:
FOR v, e, p IN 1..1 OUTBOUND 'GitCommit/f7f7931b3134e0740237242ff874dfb6820f52b4' MODIFIED
  RETURN p
queries.description: Visualizer: 13 modules changed in a single Wishbone Interface commit (Aug 2021). Run → Graph tab.

queries.title: [T4] Evolutionary Lineage — OR1200 → MOR1KX (Graph View)
queries.content:
FOR p IN UNION(
  (
    FOR ev, edge, path IN 1..1 OUTBOUND
        'MOR1KX_Golden_Entities/MOR1KX_g_2ccb86b96f39'
        CROSS_REPO_EVOLVED_FROM
      RETURN path
  ),
  (
    FOR epoch IN DesignEpoch
      FILTER epoch.repo == 'openrisc/mor1kx.git'
        AND epoch.epoch_type IN ['initial_commit', 'milestone_tag']
      SORT epoch.start_ts ASC
      LIMIT 4
      LET snap = FIRST(
        FOR mod IN INBOUND epoch BELONGS_TO_EPOCH
          FILTER mod.label == 'mor1kx_cpu'
          SORT mod.valid_from_ts DESC
          LIMIT 1
          RETURN mod
      )
      FILTER snap != null
      FOR epoch2, e, path IN 1..1 OUTBOUND snap BELONGS_TO_EPOCH
        FILTER epoch2._id == epoch._id
        RETURN path
  )
)
RETURN p
queries.description: Visualizer: CROSS_REPO_EVOLVED_FROM bridge + mor1kx_cpu at birth and v1.0. Run → Graph tab.

queries.title: [T5] GraphRAG Temporal — 2001 OR1200 Spec → Successors (Graph View)
queries.content:
FOR v, e, p IN 3..3
  ANY 'OR1200_Chunks/OR1200_dee4cc87128f2a9f'
  GRAPH 'IC_Temporal_Knowledge_Graph'
  OPTIONS { uniqueVertices: 'path' }
  FILTER REGEX_REPLACE(p.edges[0]._id, '/.*', '') == 'OR1200_MentionedIn'
  FILTER REGEX_REPLACE(p.edges[1]._id, '/.*', '') == 'OR1200_Consolidates'
  FILTER REGEX_REPLACE(p.edges[2]._id, '/.*', '') == 'CROSS_REPO_SIMILAR_TO'
  LIMIT 20
  RETURN p
queries.description: Visualizer: 2001 OR1200 spec concepts → entities → golden entities → successor repos. 8 surviving concepts across 20+ years.

queries.title: [I-A] Interval — Point-in-Time Snapshot (Graph View)
queries.content:
LET T = 1378100000

FOR mod IN RTL_Module
  FILTER mod.repo == 'openrisc/mor1kx.git'
    AND mod.valid_from_ts <= T
    AND mod.valid_to_ts   >= T
  LET best_epoch = FIRST(
    FOR ep IN OUTBOUND mod BELONGS_TO_EPOCH
      SORT ABS(ep.start_ts - T) ASC
      LIMIT 1
      RETURN ep
  )
  FILTER best_epoch != null
  FOR ep2, e, p IN 1..1 OUTBOUND mod BELONGS_TO_EPOCH
    FILTER ep2._id == best_epoch._id
    RETURN p
queries.description: Visualizer: change T to any Unix timestamp to visit the design at that moment. Default: MOR1KX just after v1.0 (37 modules).

queries.title: [I-B] Interval — Commit Activity Window (Graph View)
queries.content:
LET T1 = 1640995200
LET T2 = 1651276800

FOR c IN GitCommit
  FILTER c.repo == 'openrisc/mor1kx.git'
    AND c.valid_from_ts >= T1
    AND c.valid_from_ts <= T2
  LET cnt = LENGTH(FOR m IN OUTBOUND c MODIFIED RETURN 1)
  FILTER cnt >= 2
  FOR v, e, p IN 1..1 OUTBOUND c MODIFIED
    RETURN p
queries.description: Visualizer: commit activity between two dates. Default: Q1 2022 post-v5.1 refactoring period. Change T1/T2 to explore.

queries.title: [I-C] Interval — New Module Arrivals (Graph View)
queries.content:
LET T1 = 1327686400
LET T2 = 1378100000

FOR e IN BELONGS_TO_EPOCH
  FILTER e.role        == 'introduced_in'
    AND e.valid_from_ts >= T1
    AND e.valid_from_ts <= T2
  LET mod = DOCUMENT(e._from)
  FILTER mod.repo == 'openrisc/mor1kx.git'
  COLLECT lbl = mod.label INTO grp KEEP e, mod
  LET first_e   = grp[0].e
  LET first_mod = grp[0].mod
  LET epoch     = DOCUMENT(first_e._to)
  RETURN {
    vertices: [first_mod, epoch],
    edges:    [first_e]
  }
queries.description: Visualizer: modules introduced in a time window. Default: 29 new modules between MOR1KX birth and v1.0 (2012→2013).

queries.title: [DT1] Deep Traversal — 4-Hop Semantic Bridge (Graph View)
queries.content:
FOR v, e, p IN 4..4
    ANY 'OR1200_Golden_Entities/OR1200_g_666d09e70959'
    GRAPH 'IC_Temporal_Knowledge_Graph'
    OPTIONS { uniqueVertices: 'path', order: 'bfs' }
    FILTER REGEX_REPLACE(p.edges[0]._id, '/.*', '') == 'OR1200_Golden_Relations'
    FILTER REGEX_REPLACE(p.edges[1]._id, '/.*', '') == 'CROSS_REPO_SIMILAR_TO'
    FILTER REGEX_REPLACE(p.edges[2]._id, '/.*', '') == 'RESOLVED_TO'
    FILTER REGEX_REPLACE(p.edges[3]._id, '/.*', '') == 'HAS_SIGNAL'
    FILTER p.vertices[1].name == 'Debug unit'
    RETURN p
queries.description: Visualizer: OR1200 spec → Debug unit → IBEX Debug Mode → RTL signal → ibex_core. A single cross-repo semantic bridge path.

queries.title: [DT2] Deep Traversal — Cross-Repo Subgraph (Graph View)
queries.content:
FOR v, e, p IN 3..4
    ANY 'OR1200_Golden_Entities/OR1200_g_bd5d34270ec4'
    GRAPH 'IC_Temporal_Knowledge_Graph'
    OPTIONS { order: 'bfs', uniqueVertices: 'path' }
    LET repos = (
        FOR pv IN p.vertices
            FILTER pv.repo != null
            RETURN DISTINCT pv.repo
    )
    FILTER LENGTH(repos) >= 2
    LIMIT 25
    RETURN p
queries.description: Visualizer: 25 cross-repo paths (3–4 hops) from OR1200:Debug unit. Reaches IBEX, MAROCCHINO RTL and spec concepts.

actions.title: [RTL_Module] Module hierarchy (ports + signals + params)
actions.name: [RTL_Module] Module hierarchy (ports + signals + params)
actions.description: Expand an RTL module to show its ports, signals, parameters, and contained sub-modules.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node HAS_PORT, HAS_SIGNAL, HAS_PARAMETER, CONTAINS LIMIT 200 RETURN e

actions.title: [RTL_Module] Instantiation dependencies
actions.name: [RTL_Module] Instantiation dependencies
actions.description: Show which modules this module instantiates (and vice versa) up to 2 hops.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes FOR v, e IN 1..2 ANY node DEPENDS_ON OPTIONS { uniqueVertices: 'path' } LIMIT 100 RETURN e

actions.title: [RTL_Module] Wiring (WIRED_TO from ports/signals)
actions.name: [RTL_Module] Wiring (WIRED_TO from ports/signals)
actions.description: From a module, find its ports and signals, then follow WIRED_TO edges to see connectivity.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes LET children = (FOR c IN OUTBOUND node HAS_PORT, HAS_SIGNAL RETURN c) FOR child IN children FOR v, e IN 1..1 ANY child WIRED_TO LIMIT 200 RETURN e

actions.title: [RTL_Module] Semantic bridge → Golden Entities
actions.name: [RTL_Module] Semantic bridge → Golden Entities
actions.description: From a module, follow its ports/signals through RESOLVED_TO edges to reach golden entities.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes LET children = (FOR c IN OUTBOUND node HAS_PORT, HAS_SIGNAL RETURN c) FOR child IN children FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND child RESOLVED_TO RETURN e

actions.title: [Golden_Entities] Cross-repo bridges
actions.name: [Golden_Entities] Cross-repo bridges
actions.description: Show cross-repo similarity and evolutionary links between golden entities.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes FOR v, e IN 1..1 ANY node CROSS_REPO_SIMILAR_TO, CROSS_REPO_EVOLVED_FROM RETURN e

actions.title: [Golden_Entities] Full GraphRAG path (→ entities → chunks)
actions.name: [Golden_Entities] Full GraphRAG path (→ entities → chunks)
actions.description: From a golden entity, traverse up to 2 hops across the full graph to reach related entities and spec chunks.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes FOR v, e IN 1..2 ANY node GRAPH 'IC_Temporal_Knowledge_Graph' OPTIONS { uniqueVertices: 'path' } LIMIT 150 RETURN e

actions.title: [DesignEpoch] Modules at this epoch
actions.name: [DesignEpoch] Modules at this epoch
actions.description: Show all RTL modules that belong to the selected epoch.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes FOR v, e IN 1..1 INBOUND node BELONGS_TO_EPOCH LIMIT 200 RETURN e

actions.title: [GitCommit] Modules modified by this commit
actions.name: [GitCommit] Modules modified by this commit
actions.description: Show which RTL modules were modified by the selected commit.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND node MODIFIED RETURN e

actions.title: [RTL_Module] Time travel (epochs + commits)
actions.name: [RTL_Module] Time travel (epochs + commits)
actions.description: Show both the epochs and commits associated with a module — its full temporal context.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes FOR v, e IN 1..1 ANY node BELONGS_TO_EPOCH, MODIFIED RETURN e

actions.title: [RTL_Module] Deep traversal (4 hops, all edges)
actions.name: [RTL_Module] Deep traversal (4 hops, all edges)
actions.description: Explore up to 4 hops from a module across the entire graph. Use for discovery — may return large subgraphs.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes FOR v, e IN 1..4 ANY node GRAPH 'IC_Temporal_Knowledge_Graph' OPTIONS { uniqueVertices: 'path' } LIMIT 300 RETURN e

actions.title: [Chunks] Spec concept → cross-repo successors
actions.name: [Chunks] Spec concept → cross-repo successors
actions.description: From a spec chunk, traverse 3 hops to find cross-repo successors via entities and golden entities.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes FOR v, e IN 1..3 ANY node GRAPH 'IC_Temporal_Knowledge_Graph' OPTIONS { uniqueVertices: 'path' } LIMIT 100 RETURN e

actions.title: [RTL_Module] Show deep-RTL internals (temporal → HEAD)
actions.name: [RTL_Module] Show deep-RTL internals (temporal → HEAD)
actions.description: From a temporal module snapshot, follow SNAPSHOT_OF to the deep-RTL HEAD version and show its ports, signals, logic chunks, and parameters.
actions.queryText: FOR node IN @nodes FOR v, e IN 1..2 OUTBOUND node SNAPSHOT_OF, HAS_PORT, HAS_SIGNAL, CONTAINS, HAS_PARAMETER LIMIT 200 RETURN e
